# Swayam Maheshwari - Fullstack Developer Portfolio

> Fullstack Developer specializing in MERN Stack, TypeScript, and AI-powered web applications. Expert in OpenAI, Pinecone, and building scalable real-time systems.

## Overview

Swayam Maheshwari is a passionate Fullstack Developer with over a year of experience crafting scalable, AI-powered web applications. Currently working at Walkover Web Solutions Pvt Ltd, Swayam has built products serving 1.7k+ daily users.

## Key Expertise

- **MERN Stack**: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
- **TypeScript**: Type-safe development practices
- **AI Integration**: OpenAI API, Pinecone vector search
- **Real-time Systems**: WebSockets, Yjs collaboration
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS (S3, EC2), GCP Cloud Run, Docker
- **Databases**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ

## Featured Projects

### TechDoc
AI-first API documentation platform using OpenAI, Pinecone, Yjs, and GCP Cloud Run. Serves 1.78k+ daily users with semantic search and real-time collaboration.

### Home Deco AI
AI interior design tool that converts text prompts into realistic room visuals using OpenAI and Pinecone for semantic vector search.

### NewsAI
Chat-based AI assistant that answers real-time news queries with dynamic summaries from live global sources using NewsAPI and OpenAI.

### Through Us
Sleek blogging platform with Markdown support, Google Sign-In authentication, and real-time autosave.
